name: Betty Ford's Chocolate Icebox Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 9x9 inch cake pan with wax paper.
2. Slice the angel food cake and place a layer in the pan (slices are easier if frozen).
3. Beat the yolks of the eggs separately.
4. Melt chocolate in a double boiler over water, adding sugar and water. Mix well to ensure the sugar has melted.
5. Remove from heat and gradually stir into the beaten egg yolks until smooth.
6. Cool the mixture.
7. Add vanilla and salt, mixing well.
8. Beat egg whites until stiff.
9. Whip the cream until light and fluffy.
10. Fold the egg whites into the chocolate mixture, then add the whipped cream.
11. Place a layer of chocolate on top of the cake slices, followed by another layer of cake, and finish with a layer of chocolate.
12. Place in the refrigerator overnight to chill thoroughly. This dessert can be frozen for later use and should be allowed to chill completely before freezing.
